All Classes and Interfaces

Classes
Class
Description
BookingGUI
BookingGUI: Modern booking dialog with automatic price extraction and auto-fill
FileManager
Simple file manager to save/load primitive reservation lines.
Flight
Represents a flight in the system.
FlightSelectionWindow
 
FlightService
FlightService Acts as a lightweight in-memory data provider for flights.
MainMenu
 
ModuleDetailWindow
ModuleDetailWindow Shows a simple details window when a module item is opened.
ModuleWindow
Window that displays detailed information about a module item.
Reservation
Reservation holds a simple reservation record for any module item (flight, hotel, tour...).
ReservationService
ReservationService manages reservations (in-memory).
ReservationWindow
Enhanced ReservationWindow with modern UI and self-managed cart.
SmartCityService
SmartCityService: realistic sample data for Hotels, Restaurants, Cars, Attractions, Events, Passes, Tours.
